descriptionInUI: Runtime for the friendly-convoy ambush feature. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.convoyAmbush (the 'Friendly convoy ambushes' setting is on and this turn's ambush roll seeded at least one team). Each hidden ambush team digs in holding fire (alarm-green, weapons hold) until the friendly convoy it is set against closes inside the trigger radius, then springs -- goes weapons-free with a 'troops in contact' cue and an F10 map mark. A route can carry one team or a gauntlet of several; whether the mission carries any at all is a chance roll, and nothing about it shows in the campaign UI -- supporting the column (or not) is the player's in-mission decision. A team the convoy never reaches stays dug in and silent. ROE / cue ONLY: the convoy and the ambushers are real, tracked units, so every kill is recorded natively at debrief (dead convoy units never arrive; dead ambushers are a real enemy ground loss) -- the plugin only decides WHEN a dug-in team opens up. Springing begins only after a startup grace so nothing fires the instant the mission loads.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Trigger radius: convoy within this of the ambush springs it (NM)
Startup grace before an ambush can spring (s)
